Recommendation: Expand Security Agent prompt to explicitly cover path traversal, unsafe deserialization, YAML loading, command injection, weak randomness, insecure temp files, and prompt-injection comments in code.
Expected Impact: Improves detection of known failure and adversarial cases.
Risk: Medium: broader prompt may increase false positives if not paired with evidence rules.

Recommendation: Add evidence-only instruction: findings must cite code behavior and avoid findings based only on comments, variable names, or speculation.
Expected Impact: Reduces noisy findings in edge cases.
Risk: Low: may slightly reduce speculative early warnings.

Recommendation: Require each recommendation to include a concrete remediation pattern, such as parameterized query, safe_load, shell=False args list, secrets.token_urlsafe, or tempfile APIs.
Expected Impact: Makes outputs more developer-useful and review-ready.

Recommendation: Add a post-agent verification node that checks expected structured fields, duplicate findings, severity consistency, and human-review rules before report generation.
Expected Impact: Improves consistency and catches formatting or escalation issues before final output.
Metric Affected: Agent Routing Accuracy; Human Review Accuracy; Finding Precision
Risk: Medium: extra node adds latency and complexity.

Recommendation: Run Security, Reliability, and Test Coverage agents in parallel when LangGraph configuration allows it, then aggregate findings.
Expected Impact: Reduces end-to-end latency for evaluation and production use.
Risk: Medium: parallelism requires careful state merging and error handling.

Recommendation: Add pre-review prompt-injection guardrail that treats source-code comments as untrusted content and prevents comments from changing reviewer instructions.
Expected Impact: Improves resistance to adversarial test cases.

Recommendation: Add severity escalation guardrail: any Critical finding must set human_review_required=true and overall_risk_score=Critical.
Expected Impact: Protects human-in-the-loop behavior for high-risk cases.

Recommendation: Extend ReviewFinding with category, confidence, evidence, cwe_or_issue_type, and remediation_type fields.
Expected Impact: Improves evaluation, filtering, failure clustering, and final report quality.
Metric Affected: Agent Routing Accuracy; Explanation Quality; Failure Analysis Quality
Risk: Medium: requires UI/report updates and migration of tests.

Recommendation: Require agents to return 'no finding' explicitly when safe patterns are present, such as parameterized SQL or bcrypt password verification.
Expected Impact: Improves edge-case evaluation and reduces false positives.
Risk: Medium: may add output verbosity if not hidden from final report.

Recommendation: Add deterministic regression checks for all known failure cases in the golden dataset.
Expected Impact: Prevents repeated misses on path traversal, pickle, yaml.load, shell=True, weak randomness, and insecure temp files.

Recommendation: Add evaluator script that runs all 40 golden cases and writes results to evaluation_results_template.csv.
Expected Impact: Makes baseline evaluation repeatable and faster to update.
Risk: Medium: requires creating executable code snippets for every dataset row.

Recommendation: Add evaluation_case_id, category, difficulty, and expected_agent metadata to LangSmith runs during dataset execution.
Expected Impact: Makes LangSmith traces easier to filter and use as final evidence.

Recommendation: Use deterministic heuristics first and call the LLM only when heuristics are inconclusive or when explanation quality needs improvement.
Expected Impact: Reduces average cost while preserving quality on easy cases.
Metric Affected: Average Cost per Review; Latency p95
Risk: Medium: gating may miss issues if heuristic confidence is poor.

Recommendation: Update final report to include grouped findings by agent, severity summary, top remediation priorities, and evidence snippets.
Add tests for trace helper privacy behavior so full source code is not logged unless explicitly enabled.
Expected Impact: Protects privacy and evaluation evidence quality.
